hero.headline: Offshore software testing delivery. No compromise.
hero.subtitle: Quorexis structures and operates offshore software testing delivery. Dedicated teams, industrialized frameworks, measurable results.

expertises.title: Our software testing expertise
expertises.intro: Five specialized areas of intervention, integrated into an industrialized offshore delivery model.

functionalTesting.title: Functional Testing
functionalTesting.description: Design and execution of structured functional test campaigns. Exhaustive coverage of critical user journeys, rigorous defect management, full traceability.
deliverables: Test plans and acceptance test cases

testAutomation.title: Test Automation
testAutomation.description: Building durable automation frameworks integrated into your CI/CD pipelines. High-value scenario selection, industrialized script maintenance.

apiTesting.title: API Testing
apiTesting.description: Systematic validation of your services and microservices. Contract, functional, and integration testing to ensure the reliability of your inter-system exchanges.

performanceTesting.title: Performance Testing
performanceTesting.description: Load, stress, and endurance campaigns to validate your systems under pressure. Results analysis, bottleneck identification, optimization recommendations.

qaGovernance.title: QA Governance & KPIs
qaGovernance.description: Establishing a structured quality management framework. KPI definition, dashboard construction, reporting rituals, continuous improvement.
deliverables: KPI framework tailored to your context

approach.title: Our approach
approach.subtitle: An operational framework in three phases. Every engagement follows the same logic: assess, structure, deliver.

assess.title: Assess
assess.description: We audit your testing context, processes, tools, and organization. No generic diagnosis — a precise evaluation of your QA maturity.
activities: Audit of existing test processes and coverage
QA maturity assessment and gap identification
Risk mapping and technical dependency analysis
Formalization of quality objectives and success criteria
assess.outcome: A clear diagnosis of your QA maturity and a prioritized action plan.

structure.title: Structure
structure.description: We design the offshore delivery organization tailored to your needs: teams, processes, tools, governance. A setup ready to produce.
activities: Definition of offshore organization and staffing
Implementation of test frameworks and tools
Construction of governance model and KPIs
structure.outcome: A structured, equipped, and governed offshore testing setup.

deliver.title: Deliver
deliver.description: Our teams execute test campaigns with rigor and transparency. Continuous reporting, permanent adjustment, measurable results from the first weeks.
activities: Execution of test campaigns per validated plans
Continuous reporting and real-time tracking dashboards
Continuous improvement based on delivery metrics
deliver.outcome: Visible and measurable results, constantly improving software quality.

approach.credibility: Founded by Ahmed Ghanmi — over 10 years in software testing delivery across demanding environments.

clients.title: Trusted by industry leaders
clients.subtitle: Experience gained across major industrial and technology groups.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project
contact.intro: Need help with software testing? An offshore delivery to structure? Tell us about your context. We'll get back to you within 48 hours.
contact.name: Your name
contact.subject: Select a subject

subjectHints.functionalTesting: Describe your functional testing or acceptance testing needs.
subjectHints.apiTesting: Describe your API or service testing needs.
subjectHints.performanceTesting: Describe your load or performance testing needs.
subjectHints.qaGovernance: Describe your QA governance or quality management needs.

contact.success: Thank you. We'll get back to you within 48 hours.
contact.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

chatbot.title: Quorexis Assistant
chatbot.error: Sorry, an error occurred. Please try again.
chatbot.welcome: Hello! I'm the Quorexis assistant. How can I help you with your software testing needs?

hero.title: ISTQB Training & Certification
hero.subtitle: Quorexis trains your teams to international software testing standards. Recognized ISTQB certifications, practitioner trainers, results-oriented approach.

certifications.title: Certifications offered
certifications.subtitle: Six ISTQB certification tracks, from foundation to specialist level.

ctfl.title: CTFL — Certified Tester Foundation Level
ctfl.description: The essential foundation of the testing profession. Master the fundamentals of software testing according to the international ISTQB syllabus.

advancedTestAnalyst.title: Advanced Test Analyst
advancedTestAnalyst.description: Deepen your test analysis skills. Advanced design techniques, review and quality risk assessment.

technicalTestAnalyst.title: Technical Test Analyst
technicalTestAnalyst.description: Master the technical aspects of testing: structural testing, static analysis, security and performance testing.

testAutomationEngineer.title: Test Automation Engineer
testAutomationEngineer.description: Design and implement robust, maintainable test automation solutions. Architecture, frameworks, best practices.

agileTester.title: Agile Tester
agileTester.description: Adapt your testing practices to an agile context. The tester's role in Scrum, exploratory testing, Definition of Done.

testManager.title: Test Manager
testManager.description: Lead your organization's test strategy. Planning, estimation, tracking, governance and continuous improvement.

theory.title: Official ISTQB syllabus
theory.description: Content 100% aligned with the current ISTQB syllabus. Each module covers the learning objectives required for certification.

caseStudies.title: Real-world case studies
caseStudies.description: Practical exercises from real projects in offshore contexts. Your teams work on scenarios they will encounter in the field.

mockExams.title: Mock exams
mockExams.description: Exam simulations under real conditions. Detailed correction and weak-point analysis to maximize pass rates.

followUp.title: Post-training support
followUp.description: 30-day post-training support. Email assistance, additional resources and Q&A session.

formats.title: Training formats
formats.subtitle: Three formats adapted to your organizational and geographic constraints.

interCompany.title: Open sessions
interCompany.description: Scheduled sessions at fixed dates, open to all. Ideal for training one or two team members.

intraCompany.title: In-company
intraCompany.description: Training dedicated to your organization, adapted to your business context and tools.

remote.title: Remote
remote.description: Video-conference training with the same pedagogical quality. Interactive and collaborative virtual classes.

practitioners.title: Practitioner trainers
practitioners.description: Our trainers are active consultants with over 10 years of experience in software testing delivery. They teach what they practice daily.

successRate.title: High pass rate
successRate.description: Our structured pedagogical approach — syllabus, practical cases, mock exams — ensures a pass rate above the market average.

offshore.title: Offshore-compatible approach
offshore.description: Our training integrates the specifics of testing in an offshore context: cross-cultural communication, collaborative tools, remote governance.

personalized.title: Personalized follow-up
personalized.description: Each participant receives 30-day individual post-training support: email assistance, additional resources, Q&A session.

cta.title: Ready to certify your teams?
cta.subtitle: Schedule a call with our team to define the training path that fits your objectives.

trainingTeaser.title: ISTQB Training & Certification
trainingTeaser.subtitle: Certify your teams to international software testing standards. Six ISTQB tracks, practitioner trainers, results-oriented approach.

blog.title: Perspectives
blog.subtitle: Insights and experience reports on offshore software testing delivery.

seo.title: Quorexis — Offshore Software Testing Delivery | Test. Trust. Deliver.
seo.description: French consultancy specializing in offshore software testing delivery. Functional testing, automation, API, performance, QA governance.
seo.trainingTitle: ISTQB Training — Quorexis | Software Testing Certification
seo.trainingDescription: ISTQB training and certifications: CTFL, Test Analyst, Test Automation Engineer, Agile Tester, Test Manager. Practitioner trainers, results-oriented approach.
